project_type: Rust CLI Tic Tac Toe terminal game
test_framework: built-in #[cfg(test)] module with 49 tests in src/main.rs
verification_instructions: Run cargo test (49 tests must pass), cargo clippy -- -D warnings (no warnings), cargo fmt -- --check (no diff)
setup_instructions: No setup needed - Rust 1.92.0 with rustfmt and clippy pre-installed. Zero external dependencies.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - no crate downloads, no external network. Must use only pre-installed Rust toolchain. No Docker daemon available.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md exists. Branch is feat/tic-tac-toe-rust.
key_patterns: Single-file project (src/main.rs, 843 lines). Uses ANSI color constants, Board struct with [[Cell; 3]; 3], separate check_winner/is_full/make_move methods. Tests in a #[cfg(test)] mod tests block at bottom. Uses std::fmt::Display for Board rendering. Uses println!/print! directly to stdout. No buffered I/O. Win checking uses separate loops for rows, columns, and explicit diagonal checks.
directory_structure: Simple single-crate project: Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock, src/main.rs, .gitignore, README.md, target/ (build artifacts)
